med_violations.detail: new TaskCompletionSource(...) runs continuations synchronously on the producer's thread. Pass TaskCreationOptions.RunContinuationsAsynchronously to queue continuations to the threadpool and avoid main-thread starvation / cross-thread deadlocks.

new TaskCompletionSource<T>(...) runs continuations synchronously on the producer's thread. Pass TaskCreationOptions.RunContinuationsAsynchronously to queue continuations to the threadpool and avoid main-thread starvation / cross-thread deadlocks.

low_violations.detail: new TaskCompletionSource<bool>() runs continuations synchronously on the producer's thread. Pass TaskCreationOptions.RunContinuationsAsynchronously to queue continuations to the threadpool and avoid main-thread starvation / cross-thread deadlocks.
